subcodes.first_line: Say: O God! Thou art verily the Sovereign of kings, the Merciful to the downtrodden, the Dispeller of doubts, Who enrichest whom Thou pleasest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم انک انت سلطان الملوک و راحم المملوک و مذهب الشکوک لتغنین من تشاء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
